## Validation
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` (frontend)
- [ ] `npm run ui:audit` (frontend)
- [ ] `npm run link:audit` (frontend)

## UI Checklist
- [ ] No new undefined global utility/animation classes
- [ ] No unnecessary direct palette drift (`slate-*`) in new code
- [ ] Tiny text usage (`9/10/11px`) avoided unless required
- [ ] Focus and keyboard behavior verified
- [ ] Mobile touch targets and layout spacing verified
